response.justification: The candidate is an experienced full-stack engineer with strong breadth across web, mobile, and embedded systems and some exposure to high-throughput distributed systems (millions of requests/sec at Sociomantic/Dunnhumby). However, the role's core hard requirement of 8 years of C++ is not remotely met — C++ appears only in a ~6-month stint at National Instruments and a university thesis. There is also no large-scale cloud compute platform architecture experience and no clear formal technical-leadership role. The skills profile (TypeScript/Node/DLang) is misaligned with a C++ infrastructure platform lead position.
strengths: Exposure to low-latency, high-throughput distributed/microservices systems
Broad full-stack experience plus mentoring, teaching, and workshop facilitation
Long track record of shipping production software across many domains
concerns: Far short of the 8-year C++ requirement (only brief C/C++ exposure)
No large-scale cloud compute platform or production cloud architecture experience
No formal technical-leadership role mentoring cloud/DevOps engineers

key_factors.factor: Lack of cloud compute platform architecture
